errors.onlyHostCanEditTable: Only the host of the table can edit its details.
errors.tooManyPlayersSubscribed: There are already {currentSubscriberCount} players subscribed. You cannot set the maximum below that number.

errors.tableReachedMaximumPlayers: This table has reached its maximum of {maxPlayers} players.
errors.playerDataIdMustBeGreaterThanZero: Player data id must be greater than zero.
errors.chatHistoryAndPlayerMustBePersisted: Chat history and player must be persisted.
errors.messageMustIncludeTextOrImage: Message must include text content, an image, or audio.
errors.messageCannotIncludeImageAndAudio: Message cannot include both an image and audio.
errors.imageTooLargeSixMb: Image is too large. Please send an image smaller than 3 MB.
errors.audioTooLarge: Audio is too large. Please send audio smaller than 12 MB.
errors.chatHistoryForScheduledMatchNotFound: Chat history for scheduled match {scheduledMatchId} was not found.
errors.selectedTableWasNotFound: The selected table was not found.
errors.getMyPlayedMatchesNotImplemented: Get my played matches endpoint is not implemented yet.
errors.matchEstimatedDurationMustBeGreaterThanZ: Match estimated duration must be greater than zero.

errors.providedLocationDoesNotMatchScheduledPai: Provided location does not match the scheduled pairing attempt location.
errors.atLeastTwoPlayersRequiredToRegister: At least 2 players are required to register a match.
errors.rootMatchesMustHaveBetweenTwoAndSixPlaye: Root matches must have between 2 and 6 players.
errors.atLeastOneWinnerRequired: A match must have at least one winner.
errors.winnerCountMustBeOneOrTwo: A match must have one or two winners, but {winnerCount} winners were provided.
errors.exactlyOneWinnerRequiredNoneProvided: A match must have exactly one winner, but none was provided.
errors.exactlyOneWinnerRequiredCountProvided: A match must have exactly one winner, but {winnerCount} winners were provided.
errors.eachPlayerMustProvideExactlyOneIdentifie: Each player must provide exactly one identifier: anonymousPlayerId or playerDataId.
errors.duplicatePlayerDataId: Duplicate playerDataId found in players list: {playerDataId}.
errors.duplicateAnonymousPlayerId: Duplicate anonymousPlayerId found in players list: {anonymousPlayerId}.
errors.scoreMustBeBetweenZeroAndThirty: scoreInMatch must be between 0 and 30 when provided.
errors.onlyVagabondCanRepeatFaction: Faction {factionName} is duplicated. Only Vagabond can be repeated.
errors.atMostTwoVagabondsAllowed: A match can include at most two Vagabonds.
errors.coalitionRequiresExactlyOneVagabondWinne: When two winners are provided, exactly one of them must be Vagabond.
errors.coalitionWinnersMustUseDominance: When two winners are provided, both winners must have scoreInMatch=null (dominance).
errors.factionDuplicated: Faction {factionName} is duplicated. Each faction can be used by only one player.
errors.winnerScoreValidation: Winner must have (didWin=true and scoreInMatch=30) or (didWin=true and scoreInMatch=null).
errors.onlyWinnerCanHaveThirtyPoints: Only the winner can have scoreInMatch equal to 30.
errors.anonymousPlayersOwnershipInvalid: Anonymous players can only be used by the player that created them. Invalid ids: {invalidIds}.
errors.registerResultOnlyTwoHoursBefore: You can only register this result from 2 hours before the scheduled start time.
errors.matchStartCannotBeEarlierThanTwoHoursBef: Match start time cannot be earlier than 2 hours before the scheduled start time.
errors.matchStartCannotBeInFuture: Match start time cannot be in the future.

errors.onlyHostOrSubscribedCanCancelMatch: Only host or subscribed players can mark this match as not played.
errors.cancellationDetailsRequiredForOtherReaso: Please provide a reason description when selecting "other".

errors.onlyScheduledMatchesCanBeEdited: Only scheduled matches can be edited.
errors.onlyScheduledMatchesCanManagePlayers: Only scheduled matches can manage player subscriptions.

errors.imageContentTypeMustBeImage: {imageDescription} content type must be an image.
